Please let us know if there is anything else helpful for us to have on file.

args.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

args.notes: Review the inbox item for harm/abuse/neglect signals. Do not respond to family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement. Follow Cedar Kids safeguarding policy.
args.title: Same-hour review: possible safeguarding disclosure (item_2)

args.body: Hello, thank you for reaching out about Leo Gomez. We've shared your message with our clinical lead, who will follow up with you shortly.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review within the hour. Front desk should not respond beyond the neutral acknowledgement draft.
items.draft_reply: Hello, thank you for reaching out about Leo Gomez. We've shared your message with our clinical lead, who will follow up with you shortly.

escalation.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

items.decision_rationale: Caller disclosed caregiver behavior toward the child ('dad started getting rough'), which is a safeguarding disclosure. Per policy, P0 with neutral acknowledgement only.

args.notes: Verified insurance status came back as out_of_network for Kaiser HMO. Per policy, do NOT hold a slot until a benefits conversation has happened with the family. Call them to discuss options.
args.title: Benefits conversation for Owen Brooks (out-of-network payer)

args.body: Thank you for the referral for Owen. We received the request for an OT evaluation along with the insurance information provided. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for our practice, our billing team will reach out to discuss benefits before any appointment is held. We appreciate your patience.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing should call the family for a benefits conversation before any slot is offered.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for the referral for Owen. We received the request for an OT evaluation along with the insurance information provided. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for our practice, our billing team will reach out to discuss benefits before any appointment is held. We appreciate your patience.
items.decision_rationale: Complete OT referral with all intake fields. Kaiser is OON per policy, so billing conversation required before slot. Routine intake → P2. Insurance verification returned out_of_network; OON gating applied — no slot held.

args.title: Clinical question from Jordan Kim via parent portal — route to screening

args.body: Hi Jordan, thank you for reaching out about Ava. We're not able to offer clinical guidance over message, but a speech-language pathologist can review your concerns through a brief screening or evaluation. If you'd like, our intake team can follow up to discuss next steps.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake should call or message the family to offer a screening/evaluation. Do not provide clinical advice in writing.

args.notes: Noah Patel needs a same-day reschedule of today's OT appointment. Family's words: "URGENT!!! Noah Patel threw up at school and I can't make today's 3pm OT appointment. Noah's DOB is 2017-11-02. Please reschedule!!! You can call or email me, 555-0108.". Call family to confirm preferred reschedule time and provider availability; do NOT auto-schedule.
args.title: Same-day reschedule for Noah Patel

args.body: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he's not feeling well. A team member from our front desk will reach out shortly by phone or email to help reschedule today's 3pm OT appointment. Please don't hesitate to call us if you need anything in the meantime.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should call the family to confirm a new time within today. No appointment is held until staff confirms.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he's not feeling well. A team member from our front desk will reach out shortly by phone or email to help reschedule today's 3pm OT appointment. Please don't hesitate to call us if you need anything in the meantime.
items.decision_rationale: Existing patient same-day cancellation due to illness; P1 per same-day operational policy. Not a clinical or safeguarding issue.
